testcase.name: verifyAddDepartmentGroupTest

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //div[contains(text(),'Department Group created successfully')]' (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
